migration_readiness: 100% -- all configs built, all state extracted

openai.pros: Easiest setup, built-in vector store, thread management
openai.cons: Vendor lock-in risk, no data sovereignty, price changes
openai.recommendation: Keep as primary until FRE-001 complete

anthropic.pros: Better reasoning, lower hallucination, simpler API, cheaper
anthropic.cons: No built-in vector store (need external RAG)
anthropic.recommendation: Deploy as primary after FRE-001, keep OpenAI as backup

azure.pros: Enterprise SLA, compliance certs, data residency
azure.cons: Azure account setup overhead, same model as OpenAI
azure.recommendation: Deploy only if institutional prospect requires Azure compliance

self_hosted.pros: Zero cost, full sovereignty, no vendor dependency
self_hosted.cons: Hardware required, lower quality than GPT-4o/Claude
self_hosted.recommendation: Deploy at $50K+ ARR when infrastructure investment justified

switching_trigger_matrix.arr_exceeds_50k: Deploy self-hosted as primary, keep cloud as backup
